spec.assertion: atkPct 23.61, fullBurstEnter, all-ally {0,1,2,3}, durationSec 600 (durationShots null). Nearest-wrong: burstCast trigger -> fewer apply-frames; durationShots -> null expiresFrame; exclude-self -> drops idx 2.
reloadSpeedPct 51.16; same fullBurstEnter/10s/all-ally discriminators as P1; weapon-state modifier (gates shot count).

maxAmmoPct -50.66; removing ONLY it lowers the 256.17 last-bullet rider count (halved magazines -> more last bullets in FB). Also discriminates P6 trigger as magazine-coupled lastBullet (a hitCount:60 model is ~unaffected by maxAmmo▼).
attackDamagePct 20.16 (Damage-Up bucket); same fullBurstEnter/10s/all-ally discriminators; removing S1 lowers privaty total.

damageTakenPct 10.01, targetIdx null (BOSS debuff), lastBullet cadence (== 256.17 rider count ±2), 10s. Feeds mult.taken team-wide (more high-taken hits than S2-removed). Nearest-wrong: self/ally target -> targetIdx != null.
flatDamage 256.17, srcSlot skill2 / bucket skill, lastBullet (count << shots/3). Nearest-wrong shotFired fires the rider on every pull (count ~ shots).

flatDamage 1687, lastBullet GATED on requiresTargetStatus Designated Target. Non-vacuity: active (>=1 gated rider) AND inactive (>=1 ungated last bullet outside every window). count1687 < count256; every gated rider within ~10s of a privaty cast. Nearest-wrong: dropping the gate fires 1687 on EVERY last bullet.

elemAdvantageDamagePct 130, self-scoped, burstCast (count == #privaty-casts < #FB), 10s. INERT on a neutral boss (totals byte-identical with it removed) and LIVE on the Fire boss (removing lowers damage). Nearest-wrong: generic attackDamagePct still moves damage on a neutral boss.
flatDamage 1407.64, bucket burst, count == #privaty-casts, fbMajorApplied false (burst cast lands before the FB window). Nearest-wrong: a delayed-into-FB nuke takes the +50% major.
it.skip — stun on a non-acting partless boss has no damage observable in v1.

targetStatus Designated Target applied per burst, ~10s; verified through P7 (gated-rider existence + window clustering + gated riders span >=2 distinct cast windows => re-applied each cast, not one-time/permanent).
it.skip — boss ATK feeds no damage path in v1; the load-bearing part of this line is the Designated-Target STATUS (P11a/P7).

fixtures: controlComp(privaty, true) = liter(B1) / crown(B2) / privaty(B3, focus) / helm(B3), boss Fire, deterministic (no seed). Water>Fire on the element wheel gives privaty elemental advantage, which is what makes P8 live; the B1/B2 core lets the B3 actually cast (a lone B3 makes zero Full Bursts). Plus a bossElement:null (forced-neutral) variant of the SAME comp to discriminate P8 elemAdvantageDamagePct (damage-inert without advantage) from a generic attackDamagePct (active regardless). Slot indices: liter=0 crown=1 privaty=2 helm=3.
gaps: P10 stun 3s — it.skip: no damage observable on a non-acting partless boss in v1.
P11b ATK▼5.02% on the enemy — it.skip: boss ATK feeds no damage path in v1 (the Designated-Target STATUS is the load-bearing part, asserted via P7/P11a).
